context.description: Functional QA after fixing 7 accessibility and consistency issues
fixesVerified: FooterCredits breakpoints changed from sm: to md:
FooterNavColumn aria-labelledby added to associate h3 headings with navigation lists
FooterNav TSX class alignment with PHP
Test page updated with DemoContainer wrappers and 6 variations

build.details: Build completed successfully with only pre-existing webpack size warnings. No TypeScript or compilation errors.

lint.details: Footer blocks pass linting. Only 1 warning in FooterInfoSocialItem.tsx for experimental LinkControl API usage (pre-existing). All other lint errors are in unrelated blocks (Hero, TestimonialsCarousel).
lint.note: All Footer-related warnings are pre-existing experimental API usage, not new issues.

registration.details: All block.json files are properly structured with apiVersion 3, correct naming (takt/*), proper parent restrictions, and valid attributes. Child blocks (FooterCredits, FooterNavColumn, etc.) correctly set parent restrictions.

testPageStructure.details: Test page contains 6 footer instances wrapped in DemoContainer blocks, matching the planning spec's testPage.variations count. Block structure verified via taktician_wp_count_blocks.
variations: Full Content (Figma Match) - 6 nav columns, 5 social links, full contact info
Minimal Content - 1 nav column, 1 social link, minimal addresses
Long Content - Extended text in all fields, long headings, many links
No Optional Fields - No logo, no social label, empty hours/contact
Single Column Navigation - 1 nav column with a few links
Many Columns (8 Columns) - Tests grid wrapping with 8 nav columns

accessibility.details: All 7 accessibility fixes verified on rendered frontend

fixes.verification: All <ul> elements have aria-labelledby pointing to h3 heading IDs (e.g., aria-labelledby="footer-nav-7-heading")
TSX generates stable heading IDs using clientId (e.g., footer-nav-col-${clientId})
PHP code checks for empty linkTitle and linkLabel, sets fallback to 'Social media link'. All rendered social links have both aria-label and sr-only span.

fixes.fix: FooterCredits breakpoint changes from sm: to md:
fixes.verification: All instances use md:flex-row, md:gap-6, md:order-1, md:order-2, md:order-3, md:text-left, md:mx-auto in rendered HTML

fixes.fix: FooterNav TSX/PHP alignment - removed bg-charcoal rounded-3xl from TSX
fixes.verification: FooterNav.tsx uses 'p-8 text-white' matching FooterNav.php exactly. No bg-charcoal on <nav> element.

semanticHtml.details: Footer uses <footer> element (contentinfo landmark), all navigation uses <nav> with aria-label, all link lists use <ul>/<li> structure.

ariaAttributes.details: All <nav> elements have aria-label. FooterNavColumn <ul> elements have aria-labelledby linking to h3 headings. Social media links have aria-label + sr-only fallback.

keyboardNavigation.details: All interactive elements are native <a> links, inherently keyboard accessible.

tsxPhpSync.details: All modified files maintain TSX/PHP sync

verifications.tsx: md:flex-row, md:gap-6, md:order-1/2/3, md:text-left, md:mx-auto, md:justify-end
verifications.php: md:flex-row, md:gap-6, md:order-1/2/3, md:text-left, md:mx-auto, md:justify-end

attributeExtraction.details: No $attributes['key'] anti-pattern found in any PHP templates. All blocks use auto-extracted variables.

renderedOutput.details: All 6 footer variations render correctly on frontend. No PHP errors, warnings, or notices in rendered HTML. Page loads with HTTP 200 status.

innerBlocks.details: Footer hierarchy correctly enforces parent/child relationships. All inner blocks (footer-info, footer-nav, footer-credits) restricted to footer parent. Sub-blocks (footer-nav-column, footer-credits-item, etc.) correctly restricted to their respective parents.

specCompliance.details: Test page contains all 6 required variations from planning spec. Each variation wrapped in DemoContainer. Block count matches expected (6 takt/footer instances). No placeholder media IDs remaining.

passedChecks: Footer blocks pass linting (only pre-existing warnings)
Test page has 6 variations in DemoContainer wrappers
FooterNavColumn <ul> elements have aria-labelledby linking to h3 headings
FooterNav TSX and PHP classes are synced
All modified files maintain TSX/PHP sync
No PHP errors in rendered output

frontendVerification.socialLinksAccessibleNames: verified (aria-label + sr-only span on all social links)
